name: Peanut Butter and Jelly Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine confectioners' sugar, cracker crumbs, peanut butter and melted butter; stir until well blended.
2. Line a 9 x 13 baking pan with a double layer of aluminum foil, extending foil over the ends of the pan. Grease the foil.
3. Press the mixture into the pan.
4. For topping, place peanut butter chips in a small microwave-safe bowl. Microwave on high power for 1 minute; stir. Continue to microwave until the chips begin to melt, stirring every 15 seconds. Stir until smooth.
5. Spread the melted chips over the peanut butter mixture.
6. Using edges of foil, lift the peanut butter mixture from the pan. Spread preserves over the melted chips.
7. Cut into 1-inch squares.
Yield: about 8 dozen pieces of fudge.
